name: data-gov-uk-local-flood-risk-management-strategy-area1
notes: The Flood and Water Management Act 2010 places a statutory duty on Lead Local Flood Authorities to produce a local Flood Risk Management Strategy to support the EU Floods Directive. This Strategy covers the whole administrative area of Bolton Metropolitan Borough Council.

name: data-gov-uk-local-green-spaces

The Runnymede Local Plan was adopted in 2020 and sets out our policies for guiding and controlling the way that buildings and land are used and developed in Runnymede.
